original_image_tags: Line drawing of two men tossing a disc back and forth.
Line drawing of a man throwing a disc that curves.
Line drawing of a man throwing a disc that curves back to him. A "WIND" arrow points left.
Line drawing of a man skipping a disc off the ground labeled "HARD SURFACE".

Diagram showing four circles labeled A, B, C, and D arranged in a horizontal line. There is a label "18 FT" between circle A and circle B, and "30 FT" between circle B and circle C. There is a label "18 FT" between circle C and circle D.

elements.description: A series of four hand-drawn illustrations demonstrating how to throw a flying saucer. The top illustration, labeled 'SAIL 'EM BACK AND FORTH - PLAY CATCH !', shows two figures throwing a saucer back and forth with a dashed line indicating its path. The middle-left illustration, labeled 'MAKE 'EM TURN !', shows a figure throwing a saucer with a curved dashed flight path. The middle-right illustration, labeled 'MAKE 'EM COME BACK !', shows a figure throwing a saucer with a dashed flight path that loops back, with the label 'WIND' and an arrow indicating wind direction. The bottom illustration, labeled 'MAKE 'EM SKIP !', shows a figure throwing a saucer that bounces off a surface labeled 'HARD SURFACE' with a dashed trajectory line.

A diagram illustrating the layout for 'THE GAME OF HECKLE'. It shows four circles labeled 'circle A', 'circle B', 'circle C', and 'circle D' arranged in a line. Arrows connect the circles, indicating distances: '18 ft.' between A and B, and '30 ft.' between B and C. Circles C and D are connected with a distance marker. Text below the diagram states: 'ALL CIRCLES ARE 6 FEET IN DIAMETER .. CENTER SPACE MAY VARY WITH ABILITY.'

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the four illustrations and the circle diagram, but Description B adds specific caption text ('SAIL 'EM BACK AND FORTH', etc.) that Description A omits without contradiction.
